error_signature: empty data returned from Call Another Workflow node
title: Empty data returned from Call Another Workflow node
symptom: The Main Workflow receives empty data instead of the expected output after calling the Output-Workflow. The Output-Workflow does not wait for the full duration set in the Wait node.
not_this_if: Output-Workflow returns data correctly without the Wait node
root_cause: The Call Another Workflow node may have a timeout limit that is shorter than the wait time set in the Output-Workflow. This causes it to return empty data before the Wait node completes its duration.
fix_steps: Split the wait time into smaller intervals (e.g., 30 seconds each)
Adjust the Wait node in the Output-Workflow accordingly
Test the workflow to ensure data is returned correctly
agent_instruction: Split the wait time in the Output-Workflow into smaller intervals to ensure data is returned correctly.
